findings.message: Codex Responses websocket returned 403 Forbidden, then the CLI fell back to HTTP. Unrelated to Mini App launch.
Mini App URL must use HTTPS. Local polling can still use Telegram bot commands; Telegram WebApp buttons and menu setup require a public HTTPS /miniapp URL.
HappyTG services already appear to be running on 3007, 4000, 4100, 4200.
